description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206). A 2-agent local_workflow run (mirrors local-workflow-capture-probe incl. an interpolated-prompt agent). Contains BOTH the wire stream (stream-input.jsonl with task_* + background_tasks_changed{task_type:local_workflow} frames) AND the on-disk session tree (<sessionId>/ with journal.jsonl, agent transcripts, script) for workflow-tree/journal-tailer/route tests.
